title: Relay message envelope
description: One line of ledger.jsonl. Every inter-agent message is exactly one of these. Topology and per-edge vocabulary are enforced by the orchestrator's append() chokepoint; this schema documents the wire format an auditor reads.

seq.description: Monotonic, gap-free sequence number. Total order of the conversation.

type.description: Message kind. Legal values depend on the directed edge (from>to).

refs.description: IDs this message relates to (behaviour id, expectation id, ...). Lets an auditor trace a single behaviour's lineage.

in_reply_to.description: seq of the message this responds to. Builds the causal chain.
